yardiCaseStudy.headerTitle: Trusted YARDI Partner for North America’s Largest PHA
yardiCaseStudy.clientDesc: A prominent multifamily real estate firm based in the U.S. specializes in acquiring, developing, and repositioning residential and commercial properties. Focusing on operational excellence and long-term value creation, the firm is dedicated to building thriving communities while maximizing returns for its investors.
yardiCaseStudy.challengesDesc: The client faced operational inefficiencies in managing multiple property management platforms, including Yardi Voyager 7, MRI, Voyager, and RealPage:
yardiCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: Rialtes, a trusted Yardi Managed Services provider, delivered a structured and scalable solution to address these gaps:

challengesList.title: Skill Silos
challengesList.description: Reliance on individual experts for each platform created bottlenecks. Any unavailability led to delays.

challengesList.title: Talent Shortage
challengesList.description: Local hiring markets lacked specialists with deep knowledge of the client’s specific tech stack.

challengesList.title: Lack of Centralized Oversight
challengesList.description: Projects were loosely organized, limiting effective collaboration and knowledge sharing.

solutionStepsList.title: Capability Assessment
solutionStepsList.description: Conducted a thorough review of the client’s internal team and identified skill gaps.

solutionStepsList.title: Team Augmentation
solutionStepsList.description: Deployed skilled resources to complement the client's in-house team, providing immediate support for Yardi, MRI, and RealPage.

solutionStepsList.title: Collaborative Transition
solutionStepsList.description: Initial support was provided offshore by Rialtes' technical team, gradually transitioning to a hybrid model with shared responsibilities.

solutionStepsList.title: End-to-End Ownership
solutionStepsList.description: After a successful year, Rialtes took full ownership of all related systems—Yardi, RealPage, affordable housing, residential, and commercial support, delivering a comprehensive managed service model.

benefitsList: With a follow-the-sun model, the client now receives round-the-clock assistance, ensuring zero operational downtime across time zones.
Multi-resource coverage eliminated dependency on individual contributors, increasing system resilience by 90%.
By introducing primary and backup personnel for all critical systems, Rialtes significantly reduced service interruptions.
Leveraging offshore resources cuts costs by nearly one-third compared to maintaining a full in-house California-based team.
The client gained on-demand access to a wide range of skills across Yardi, MRI, RealPage, and infrastructure without the burden of hiring locally.

automateCaseStudy.autoTitle: Automating Order Processing in Healthcare using MuleSoft
automateCaseStudy.clientDesc: A global medical technology company specializing in the development and manufacture of innovative products for diagnosing, treating, and monitoring cardiovascular and endovascular conditions. Their portfolio includes pacemakers, defibrillators, and remote monitoring systems for patients with implanted devices. The company’s mission is to improve the quality of life for individuals with heart and blood vessel diseases through advanced medical technologies.
automateCaseStudy.companyDesc: The company faced significant inefficiencies due to a manual, disconnected order processing workflow between Salesforce (used for sales and patient management) and SAP (used for finance and accounting). Key challenges included:
automateCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: Rialtes implemented an integrated Salesforce-SAP solution using MuleSoft, bridging the gap between systems and automating the entire order lifecycle. Key components of the solution:
automateCaseStudy.benefitsDesc: The integration delivered measurable improvements across departments:

problemList.title: Manual data entry
problemList.description: across systems, leading to frequent delays and human errors.

problemList.title: Lack of integration
problemList.description: between sales and finance teams, resulting in data silos and miscommunication.

problemList.title: Complexity in payment processing
problemList.description: including insurance claims, co-pays, and direct payments.

solutionsList.title: Automated Order Syncing
solutionsList.description: Orders created in Salesforce now automatically trigger corresponding entries in SAP, eliminating the need for manual duplication.

solutionsList.title: Real-Time Data Updates
solutionsList.description: Any modifications in one system are instantly reflected in the other, ensuring data accuracy and consistency.

solutionsList.title: MuleSoft as a Middleware
solutionsList.description: Used to map and translate data between systems, accommodating different formats and adhering to healthcare data privacy regulations.

solutionsList.title: Role-Based System Segregation
solutionsList.description: Salesforce is now focused on patient data and order creation, while SAP manages invoicing, settlements, and accounting—allowing teams to operate within their areas of expertise.

benefitsList: 60% reduction in order processing time by eliminating manual data entry.
Real-time synchronization between Salesforce and SAP minimized errors and improved data integrity.
Improved collaboration between sales and finance teams through shared visibility into order and payment statuses.
Up to 40% fewer order discrepancies, thanks to automated validation and real-time updates.
Streamlined payment handling, enabling seamless processing of insurance, co-pays, and direct payments.
Increased productivity—sales teams can now focus on growth, while finance handles transactions with greater efficiency.

digitizingCaseStudy.digitizingTitle: Digitizing the Patient Journey Using Salesforce Health Cloud
digitizingCaseStudy.clientDesc: A global medical technology company dedicated to improving lives through innovative cardiovascular and endovascular care. The company designs and manufactures pacemakers, defibrillators, and remote monitoring systems used by healthcare professionals worldwide. Their mission is to support better patient outcomes by combining advanced medical technology with seamless digital experiences.
digitizingCaseStudy.peoblemDesc: The company had recently introduced a new patient journey system, but it lacked the critical functionality needed to deliver a truly connected and engaging healthcare experience.
digitizingCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: The client partnered with Rialtes to modernize the patient experience by building a fully integrated, digital-first solution.
benefitsList: 30% increase in therapy adherence through gamified engagement and automated reminders.
40% improvement in data submission rates, enabling more proactive care.
50% reduction in phone-based support as self-service and digital communication became primary channels.
Enhanced patient satisfaction with personalized, on-the-go access to therapy information and education.
Scalable architecture, ready for future enhancements like AI-driven insights and broader wearable device integration.

challengesList.title: Limited digital engagement
challengesList.description: Patients relied on phone calls, physical visits, and in-person educational sessions for all interactions.

challengesList.title: No real-time communication
challengesList.description: The system lacked virtual touchpoints, making it difficult for patients to contact healthcare providers outside of clinic visits.

challengesList.title: No self-service data input
challengesList.description: Patients couldn’t submit important health data—like sleep patterns, activity levels, or medication usage, digitally.

challengesList.title: Lack of real-time monitoring
challengesList.description: Providers had no visibility into whether patients were adhering to their therapy plans between visits.

solutionsList.title: Mobile Application
solutionsList.description: Developed for Android and iOS, the app connected seamlessly with Salesforce Health Cloud to serve as a central hub for patient engagement.

solutionsList.title: Self-Guided Onboarding
solutionsList.description: Patients could easily register and access a personalized dashboard to view therapy progress, action items, and relevant data.

solutionsList.title: Data Submission & Tracking
solutionsList.description: Patients could log vital information—such as sleep, discomfort levels, and medication adherence, directly in the app. Integration with wearable devices (e.g., Apple Watch) enabled automatic collection of metrics like heart rate and step count.

solutionsList.title: Telehealth & Messaging
solutionsList.description: Enabled secure, real-time communication between patients and providers for queries, updates, and appointment scheduling.

solutionsList.title: Gamification & Engagement
solutionsList.description: Patients were encouraged to submit data and complete health-related tasks through gamified elements, improving long-term adherence.

solutionsList.title: Smart Notifications
solutionsList.description: Automated reminders prompted patients to share health data consistently, ensuring ongoing visibility for care teams.

solutionsList.title: In-App Education
solutionsList.description: Patients could access videos and articles to understand their conditions and therapies. Providers could monitor content engagement and deliver personalized follow-up materials.

empoweringCaseStudy.headerTitle: 150 Orders a Day, Zero Manual Work: The Fiori-Powered Self-Service Order Prioritization
empoweringCaseStudy.clientDesc: Our client is a renowned manufacturer of high-quality roofing products with a legacy built on innovation, quality, and sustainability. With a diverse portfolio that includes asphalt shingles, roofing accessories, underlayment, and waterproofing solutions, they serve both residential and commercial markets. Backed by cutting-edge manufacturing facilities and a robust distribution network, the company is a trusted partner for builders, contractors, and homeowners nationwide.
empoweringCaseStudy.challengesDesc: Despite the client's significant technological investments in manufacturing, their order management process relied heavily on manual intervention. Customers who wanted to prioritize certain sales orders had to call the sales team and share their list of urgent orders. This required the sales team to manually adjust loading dates for approximately 150 orders daily—an inefficient and error-prone process that consumed valuable time and resources.
empoweringCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: Rialtes partnered with the client to streamline and digitize their order prioritization process. We developed a custom SAP Fiori app that enabled customers to independently access their open orders and select which orders needed prioritization. Key features of the solution contained:
solutionsList: A user-friendly interface for customers to view and select open orders
Planning logic integrated with manufacturing capacity to ensure realistic timelines
An intelligent allocation system based on predefined customer allotments
Self-service functionality to allow customers to prioritize orders without sales team intervention
empoweringCaseStudy.benefitsDesc: The implementation of the Fiori app transformed sales order management for our clients, delivering measurable improvements across operations:

benifitList.title: Improved Efficiency
benifitList.description: The manual adjustment of over 150 sales orders daily was eliminated. This saved the sales team approximately 25+ hours per week, allowing them to focus more on customer engagement and strategic activities.

benifitList.title: Customer Empowerment
benifitList.description: With direct control over order prioritization via the Fiori app, customers gained transparency and flexibility, leading to a 20% increase in customer satisfaction and a 30% drop in support queries related to order status and changes.

benifitList.title: Optimized Planning
benifitList.description: Real-time visibility into order data enabled smarter alignment of material allocation and production planning with customer demand and plant capacity, improving planning accuracy by 40% and reducing stock outs and missed deliveries by 20%.

benifitList.title: Reduced Errors
benifitList.description: The removal of manual data entry decreased order processing errors by over 80%, enhancing accuracy and helping achieve a 15% improvement in on-time and in-full (OTIF) delivery metrics, critical for the construction supply chain.

leadingCaseStudy.leadingTitle: Leading Automotive Manufacturer Achieved 35% Higher Customer Satisfaction Score with AutoSense
leadingCaseStudy.clientDesc: A prominent global automotive car manufacturer, known for its innovation and high-performance vehicles, was facing challenges with its legacy warranty management system. The system was built on a Java/J2EE-based dealer portal, which had become cumbersome, difficult to maintain, and lacked the flexibility required to support evolving business needs. The client needed a comprehensive, modern solution to streamline warranty claims, enhance dealer interaction, and optimize overall warranty management processes.
leadingCaseStudy.keyDesc: The client’s legacy system posed several significant challenges that hindered warranty management and overall dealer performance:
leadingCaseStudy.solutionDesc: To address these challenges, the automotive manufacturer partnered with Rialtes, a global consulting company known for its expertise in AI-powered digital solutions, to deliver a state-of-the-art Warranty Management System built on Salesforce Automotive Cloud.  Rialtes implemented its signature service, AutoSense, to provide a modern, scalable, and integrated warranty management platform.
leadingCaseStudy.featuresTitle: Key Features of the AutoSense Warranty Management Portal
leadingCaseStudy.benefitsDesc: By leveraging the AutoSense warranty management solution, the automotive manufacturer achieved several significant benefits:
leadingCaseStudy.serviceTitle: Key Deliverables by Rialtes Under the AutoSense Service:
leadingCaseStudy.conclusionDesc: Rialtes successfully delivered a transformative warranty management system for the automotive manufacturer, shifting from the outdated Java/J2EE-based portal to a powerful, integrated solution powered by Salesforce Automotive Cloud and integrated with  SAP S/4 HANA. The result was a more efficient, scalable, and user-friendly warranty management process that significantly enhanced dealer performance, reduced claim resolution times, and improved customer satisfaction.
leadingCaseStudy.conclusionDescOne: With the AutoSense service, Rialtes empowered the client to streamline its warranty claims management, optimize workflows, and gain real-time insights into warranty data, positioning the manufacturer for continued growth in a competitive automotive market.

benefitsList.title: Improved Warranty Claims Efficiency
benefitsList.desc: The streamlined process for submitting, tracking, and managing warranty claims reduced manual intervention, sped up processing times, and increased dealer satisfaction.

benefitsList.title: Real-Time Visibility
benefitsList.desc: With the integration of Salesforce Automotive Cloud, the client gained access to real-time data on warranty claims, inventory, and vehicle status, enabling more informed decision-making and faster resolution of issues.

benefitsList.title: Increased Dealer Adoption
benefitsList.desc: The modern, user-friendly interface of the AutoSense portal led to higher dealer adoption rates, improving overall productivity and engagement.

benefitsList.title: Operational Efficiency
benefitsList.desc: Automation of key workflows reduced errors, improved accuracy in warranty claim settlements, and freed up valuable resources to focus on more strategic tasks.

benefitsList.title: Enhanced Customer Satisfaction
benefitsList.desc: The faster, more transparent warranty claims process led to improved customer satisfaction, as dealers could resolve warranty issues promptly, increasing customer loyalty and trust.

serviceList.title: Stakeholder Workshops & Requirement Definition
serviceList.desc: Rialtes facilitated workshops with warranty, IT, and dealer management teams to capture pain points, define business requirements, and align on a clear project vision.

serviceList.title: Agile Solution Development
serviceList.desc: Rialtes followed an agile development methodology, delivering the solution in defined sprints, ensuring iterative progress and flexibility to adapt to emerging needs.

serviceList.title: Custom Warranty Management Portal Development
serviceList.desc: The warranty management portal was built on Salesforce Automotive Cloud, featuring warranty claims submission, order management, inventory tracking, and vehicle lifecycle management.

serviceList.title: Seamless System Integration
serviceList.desc: Rialtes integrated AutoSense with SAP S/4 HANA for order and financial management, ensuring accurate financial tracking and efficient order fulfillment.

serviceList.title: Testing & Quality Assurance
serviceList.desc: Rialtes ensured that the solution met rigorous quality standards, conducting extensive testing to ensure the platform’s performance, security, and usability.

serviceList.title: Training & Support
serviceList.desc: Comprehensive training for dealers and internal teams was provided to ensure smooth adoption and effective use of the new portal. Rialtes also offered ongoing support to address future updates and enhancements.

featureList.title: Warranty Claims Submission & Tracking
featureList.desc: The AutoSense portal enabled dealers to submit and track warranty claims seamlessly. Dealers could view real-time status updates, ensuring faster resolution times and improving overall customer satisfaction.

featureList.title: Lead Submission & Nurturing
featureList.desc: AutoSense’s warranty portal integrated lead submission functionality, allowing the warranty team to capture claims-related leads and proactively nurture them through automated follow-up processes.

featureList.title: Opportunity Management
featureList.desc: The system allowed warranty managers to track potential opportunities arising from warranty claims, including upsell and cross-sell possibilities for extended warranties and additional services, improving overall revenue potential.

featureList.title: Order Management
featureList.desc: The portal provided an integrated order management system for warranty replacements, enabling dealers to track replacement parts, place orders, and update claim statuses in real-time.

featureList.title: Inventory Search with Vehicle Images
featureList.desc: The AutoSense portal offered an intuitive inventory search tool that allowed dealers to check available replacement parts, view part images, and filter inventory by specifications. This reduced downtime and sped up the claims process, enhancing dealer productivity.

featureList.title: Vehicle Lifecycle Management
featureList.desc: AutoSense provided visibility into the entire lifecycle of each vehicle, from the original sale to post-sale services and warranty claims. This holistic view ensured warranty managers had accurate information when processing claims and tracking vehicle-related issues.

solutionList.title: Design Workshops
solutionList.desc: Rialtes began the project with a series of design workshops, engaging key stakeholders from the manufacturer’s warranty, dealer management, and IT teams. These workshops helped define the specific pain points, business requirements, and goals for the new warranty management system.

solutionList.title: Agile Development Process
solutionList.desc: Rialtes adopted a detailed agile plan, breaking the solution into manageable sprints to ensure timely delivery of key functionalities. Each sprint focused on delivering high-priority features and capabilities, with regular feedback loops to ensure alignment with the client’s objectives.

solutionList.title: Salesforce Automotive Cloud Integration
solutionList.desc: The warranty management portal was built on Salesforce Automotive Cloud, leveraging its powerful features to streamline warranty claims, automate workflows, and provide real-time visibility into claims processing, inventory, and vehicle lifecycle data.

solutionList.title: SAP S/4 HANA Integration for Order & Financial Management
solutionList.desc: Rialtes ensured the solution integrated seamlessly with SAP S/4 HANA to optimize order processing, financial tracking, and warranty claim financial settlements, reducing errors and ensuring accurate invoicing.

keyList.title: Outdated Technology
keyList.desc: The legacy Java/J2EE-based application was no longer able to meet the dynamic needs of the automotive business. The system struggled with scalability issues, slowing down response times and leading to inefficiencies.

keyList.title: Lack of Integration
keyList.desc: The warranty management system was not integrated with other critical business platforms such as inventory management and sales systems, leading to disjointed workflows and data silos.

keyList.title: Limited Functionality
keyList.desc: The legacy system was incapable of handling modern warranty claims processes, such as real-time claims tracking, inventory checks, and the management of vehicle lifecycles.

keyList.title: Poor User Experience
keyList.desc: The dealer portal lacked an intuitive interface, leading to low adoption and significant frustration for dealers who struggled with complex navigation and time-consuming processes.

keyList.title: Inefficient Claims Process
keyList.desc: The warranty claims process was manual, error-prone, and lacked transparency, which caused delays, increased costs, and dissatisfied customers.

omnichannelCaseStudy.serviceTitle: Transforming Omnichannel Case Management Using Salesforce Service Cloud
omnichannelCaseStudy.clientDesc: A leading provider of high-performance analog semiconductors powering wireless and wired connectivity across industries. Their core offerings, amplifiers, filters, switches, and integrated modules, support efficient wireless transmission for smartphones, routers, medical devices, automobiles, and more. Renowned for innovation, they are a critical technology partner for both consumer and industrial applications globally.
omnichannelCaseStudy.problemDesc: The client faced persistent challenges in delivering consistent, high-quality customer service across global regions due to a fragmented, legacy support system. Key issues included:
omnichannelCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: Rialtes implemented Salesforce Service Cloud and Experience Cloud to centralize customer support and create a scalable, future-ready solution. Key elements of the implementation:
problemList: Disjointed customer interaction data across platforms, making it hard to track service history.
Lack of visibility into historical case data and customer behavior.
Manual case management with no automation for routing or resolution.
Limited self-service options, forcing customers to rely on email and phone channels.

featureList.title: Unified Support Platform
featureList.desc: All customer interactions, across internal teams, distributors, and OEMs, are now managed on a single platform.

featureList.title: Self-Service Portal
featureList.desc: Distributors and OEMs can submit and track cases, and access a robust knowledge base 24/7.

featureList.title: Real-Time Communication
featureList.desc: Built-in chat and messaging facilitate direct conversations between support teams and customers.

featureList.title: Knowledge Consolidation
featureList.desc: Legacy support content was migrated into a centralized, searchable repository.

featureList.title: Einstein AI Assistance
featureList.desc: AI-driven recommendations help customers resolve issues faster and reduce case volume.

featureList.title: Automated Case Assignment
featureList.desc: Routing logic based on geography and expertise ensures timely and accurate responses.

featureList.title: Cross-Continent Collaboration
featureList.desc: Support teams can now share knowledge and updates effortlessly across time zones.

featureList.title: Segmented Content Delivery
featureList.desc: Targeted release of support updates and critical info to specific customer groups.

featureList.title: Data Migration & Insights
featureList.desc: Historical case data migration enables in-depth trend analysis and smarter decision-making.

benifitList: 60% reduction in average case resolution time, thanks to automation and AI assistance.
30% increase in customer self-service adoption, reducing support workload.
Enhanced visibility into the complete customer journey, enabling targeted upselling and proactive service.
360° customer view across service channels, devices, and global teams.
Improved global support consistency and seamless collaboration across continents.
Scalability for future integration with Salesforce CPQ and Marketing Cloud, enabling a unified customer lifecycle.
Knowledge article usage increased by 45%, improving first-contact resolution.
